titleStmt.title: SII 34.142: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 142. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman [mistake for Rājakēsarivarman] Rājarāja III, 29th year, sudi 14, Monday, Maghā = A.D. 1245, February 12, Sunday (not Monday).

The sabhā of Chōḻamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Mīkōḻai-nāḍu a unit of Pāṇḍikulāsani-vaḷanāḍu made a gift of 4 vēli of land that was lying waste in the northern hamlet of the village for making a flower garden (nandavanam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cīrmaṉṉiyirunāṉku ticaiviḷaṅku tirumaṭantaiyum pOr maṉṉu jayamaṭantaiyum puvimaṭantaiyum maṇam puṇara Arumaṟaiyiṉ neṟivāḻa AruntamiḻOr kiḷai vāḻap poruvil maṉuneṟi vāḻap poṉṉi makuṭaṅ kavittaruḷi veṅkOpak karuṅkalip pakaiviṭai nākar pelampaṭarac ceṅkOlum koṭippīliyum tikirivarai varampaḷakka Eṇṭicara mukatteṇ tarikkumeṭutta tanikūṭameṉṉa Aṇ
ṭakūṭamuṟa nimirttu muḻumatikkoṭai niṉṟaḻakerippa naṭuvuniṉṟu kuṭikāttu naṉṟāṟṟum tiṟam poṟātu kaṭitiḻai Uṭpakaiyum piṟappakaiyum Aṟakkaṭintu polantikatipa ṉāṉku puvaṉaṅkaḷumaṭippaṭutti Ilaṅku katir vaṭamēruvil vayappuliyēṟeṉṉa cempon vīrasiṅhāsanattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōpparakēcari paṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravart
tikaḷ śrīirājarāja cōḻa tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 vatu pūrvvepakṣattu caturttaciyum tiṅkaṭ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ pāṇṭi kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu mīkōḻaināṭṭu prahmatēyam śrī cōḻamātēvi caturvvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahā sabhaiyōm taṉmatānap piramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭu Innāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruveṟumpiyūruṭaiya nāyanāṟkut
tava tanmatānam paṇṇikkuṭutta nilam tu Inta cōḻa mātēvic catuppēti maṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākaiyi ṅa kkuṭaiya Anāti pāḻāy vanta potuppaṟṟili kā makku laiyum māna nilattukku Icaiñta peru nānkellaiyāvātu kīḻ pāṟkellaiyāvatu tennavan piramarāyan kuṭikāṭenṟu collap
paṭṭa kuṭikāṭṭu mēlellai cakkarapāṇi kuḻi mēl karai te ṉa cevvaikku mēṟkum tenpāṟkellai cekkarapāṇi kuḻi vaṭakarai kuḻikku llaikku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai �ḻāṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Itan tiru llaikku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunānkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai Uṭpaṭa vanta nilam
Innilam nālvēliyum nāṅkaḷ Uṭaiyār tiruveṟumpiyūruṭaiya nāyanāṟku Ūrpēr I na tirunantavanam Enṟu pēr Uṭai tirunantavanam ceytōm tanmatāṉam paṇṇi tanmatāṉam piramāṇa Icaiyu tīṭṭuk kuṭuttōm Ipperuṅkuṟi mahāsapaiyōm Ippaṭi mikutikkuṟaivuṭpaṭa vanta nilam nāluvēliyum tanmatānap piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭavōmākavum
Ivvicaivut tīṭṭum tanmatāṉap piramāṇamāvatākavum Ituvallatu vēṟu tanmatānap piramāṇaṅ kāṭṭak kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu tanmatānam paṇṇi tanmatānap piramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭukkuṭuttōm Ittēvart tiruveṟumpiyūruṭaiya nāyanāṟku Iccōḻa mātēvic catuppēti maṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahāsapayōm Ippaṭikku Ivai perumaṅkalattu nārāyaṇa nārāyaṇa ta celva
Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭi tanmatānam ttu Irācamahēntira nampi ciṅkappirān paṭṭan Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai nampūrk kāṭṭukkaic cīrāma paṭṭan Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai nāraṇamaṅkalam cīkaṇṭan purucōttama paṭṭan Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai nāyakapaṭṭan Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai kōṭṭaiyūr Ulakamuṇṭān
Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai tūṟppil cātavētapaṭṭan Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai llāttūr nampiyeḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai puḷḷamaṅkalattu
raṇamaṅkalattu Aruḷmāri nampiyeḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭi Aṟivēn Uṟuppiṭṭūr Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai kōyil Aḻaku koṇṭa piramārāya Eḻuttenṟum
yātanamaikku Ivai tūyppilc cīrāmapaṭṭanāna vikkirama cōḻappiramārāyan Eḻuttenṟum Ippaṭi Aṟivēn Ātanūr cātavēta citarapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭi Aṟivēn �paṭṭan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumuṭi cūṭṭinān nampimakan cīrāmapaṭṭanāna cōḻappirama
tirucaṇiṉa paṭṭan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai pu kaḷattu maturantakap piramārāyan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai kāñcai kōvalap pirān paṭṭan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai kōṭṭaiyūr Ulakamuṇṭān nampiyeḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr punamalai paṭṭan Eḻut
ppan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai tūyppil tekkaṇāmūrtti paṭṭar cōmaiyāciyār makan Eññamūtti paṭṭan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭi paṇiyāl tanmatānap piramāṇam
Digital edition of SII 34.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
